author: Robert Lucier
title: BIMI Grand Reopening
summary: Block Island Maritime Institute (BIMI) Reopened.
content:
Block Island Maritime Institute (BIMI) Reopened.

Come see our new facility and our fabulous five-tank outdoor aquarium! Meet Turtle!
See baby sharks and their unhatched siblings! 


Discover what is in the Great Salt Pond and local ocean waters while staying on land!
Enjoy some arts and crafts and games!


End your visit with a free ice cream for the kids and relax on the deck or in the Adirondack chairs on the back lawn.

There is no charge for this event, but donations are greatly welcomed. Donate through our Lobsta Fest campaign and get a chance to win a great Lobsta dinner for 12 delivered to your door anywhere in the contiguous United States.

author: Cindy BlockIslandChamber
title: Brave Daughters Studio Jewelry Event at Mar Mar Boutique
summary: Choose from 14k gold or gold filled chain to be laser welded around your wrist, neck or ankle for a claspless (and painless!) experience.
content:
Choose from 14k gold or gold filled chain to be laser welded around your wrist, neck or ankle for a claspless (and painless!) experience.

Appointments are strongly recommended, and can be made by clicking the link on @marmarjewelsboutique Instagram account or by calling 215-880-3922.

author: Cindy BlockIslandChamber
title: Block Island Arts & Artisans Festival at the Narragansett Inn
summary: This island tradition takes place once a year on the Harbor Church lawn right in town. This three day festival is brimming with all things artistic; oil or water color paintings, jewelry, pottery, jewelry, fabrics, candles,photographs and other hand made pieces created by a very talented group of artists.
content: This island tradition takes place once a year on the Harbor Church lawn right in town. This three day festival is brimming with all things artistic; oil or water color paintings, jewelry, pottery, jewelry, fabrics, candles,photographs and other hand made pieces created by a very talented group of artists.
